prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford Cleveland 351C (351-4V, engine code: 9.0:1 compression, cast-iron block)** with a **Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body injection system** (PN: 550-511K) replacing the stock carburetor, paired with a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft** (PN: 35-252-8) for 0.544" lift and 244° duration at 0.050"

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT42R turbocharger (76mm, .88 A/R turbine housing)** with a **Turbonetics Deltagate 40 wastegate** (PN: 44301) and **Precision Turbo 46mm external wastegate** (PN: 4666), feeding into a **Custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping kit** by **PWR Performance** (Australia) with a **Setrab 10-row oil cooler** (PN: 52010-1) for heat management

Suspension overhaul with **Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm, PN: BSF28Z)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (PN: SPF0116K)** for the front control arms, paired with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (PN: B16 PSS10)** revalved specifically for the XB GT’s leaf-spring rear end, retaining the **9" Ford diff with a **Currie Enterprises 31-spline full-float housing** (PN: CE-9F) and **Detroit Locker (PN: 225SL-370A)**
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (PN: RB-FALXB-001)** modified for the XB GT’s chassis, including **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** with **Vortex Generators** by **Seibon Carbon** (PN: CF-FALXB-SPLITTER)

OEM+ resto-mod interior with **Recaro SRD seats (PN: 391.91.50)** in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**, wrapped in **Bridge of Weir leather** and paired with a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, PN: 001-102-350)** on a **NRG Innovations quick-release hub (PN: NRG-101)**

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Hella 500 Series driving lamps (PN: 1NA 007 399-011)** with **custom Cibié Oscar LED taillights** (vintage-style, DOT-approved) and **Lux HID Projector headlights (H4, 55W, 6000K, PN: LUX-H4-6K)** with **Morimoto Anti-Flicker Modules (PN: MOR-XBFLKR)**
